storySections.title: Basic Information
storySections.content:
Every word and action embodies loyalty, every move reflects virtue.

Although "knowing propriety and righteousness, being strict with oneself" is deeply engraved in the soul, this virtuous knight undoubtedly still bears the appearance of a child.

But please do not worry, even if the price is eternal demise, Ogier will spare no effort to fulfill his lord's commands.

May that day never come.

storySections.title: Story: I
storySections.content:
A.F.2@2, November, a major earthquake struck the Beren region.
The next day, two professors were ordered to head to the disaster area to search for the missing Mythag investigation team.
The team was last active along the Mare Internum coast, primarily tasked with exploring, excavating historical relics, and searching for possible leads related to the "D-phenomenon." 
On November 8, at the location where team members were reportedly last seen, Professor @2 discovered an unrecorded palace ruin and recovered a Mythag-standard silver key, numbered I-@2, but did not find any team members.
On November 9, two Silvers were unearthed at the site, which were later taken back to Londinium and sealed due to their historical value, to be Awakened on another day.

storySections.title: Story: II
storySections.content:
"If it's your first time carrying out an investigation mission, go find little Ogier to accompany you!" 

In response to the anxiety of new investigators, experienced seniors always offer this advice. Ogier's popularity among students is evident from this. 

Although his old-fashioned personality occasionally causes minor incidents, they support each other and lift one another up. Ogier always achieves the most harmonious rhythm with the investigators. In recent years, having Ogier accompany new investigators on their first missions has become a consensus among everyone at the school. Jokes like "Ogier prepares a cloak for female investigators" and "Ogier blushes when he sees legs" have also spread among the students. 

The title of "Death Knight" has gradually been forgotten, drowned in trust and warmth, leaving only a tiny thorn embedded in the young boy's heart.

storySections.title: Story: III
storySections.content:
Few people in school remember that the boy was once called the "Death Knight". 

Only at midnight does the scenery of that day transform into a nightmare, infiltrating the boy's dreams.

The dissoluted bodies invading the campus, the collapsed bell tower, the barely surviving "Keeper". 

"Don't cry, Ogier, it's not your fault..." 

The iron cavalry invading the home, the tilted palace, the black blood flowing from the princess's fingers.

"Don't sacrifice yourself for me, Ogier, you've done enough already..." 

The grains of memory entwined with pain wash over the boy's spirit.

storySections.title: Story: IV
storySections.content:
— How can this not be his fault? What he has done is far from enough.

With such extreme self-blame, Ogier executes his tasks at twice the frequency of other Awakeners, burying "Death" under universally praised "Virtue".

The excessive work and the words of gratitude from young Investigators seem to wash away the pain etched into the Soul.

Chronic ailments are pushed into the Shadows of the heart, emitting a rotting smell, secretly leading the knight towards the deep black mire.

"Sorry? Hello?"

Someone came to Ogier with a ray of sunshine, or a gust of wind.

"Senior said Ogier will join me and Ramona to carry out my initial Investigation task, right?"

He couldn't protect the princess for a second time, but Heaven gave him another chance to protect the "Keeper".

"My name is Ogier, and it is an honor to form a Contract with you. I will guard your Life with my Soul. Today's vow will be remembered forever."
